name: Buildablock Corp.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Back to Table of Contents The Company, f/k/a HIPSO Multimedia, Inc., a Florida corporation, was incorporated in April 2005. The Company entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement on November 30, 2011, providing for the acquisition of intellectual property rights comprised of an Internet and mobile service platform whose purpose is to empower or capitalize on the growth of the neighborhood, local economy (the Buildablock Assets).
